I am writing this to you, Dylan, our first born son. I want to start to practice talking to you about life. I am hoping that by the time we can converse about the big things in life, I will have something to say. Pretty soon, you will have a younger brother, so we won\'t be able to pour all our hearts to just you, as we will have to grow as a family together, and Eliot will need a lot of attention to grow in the first few years. I am hoping that you will be the helpful wee boy that you always are when your brother lands on this earth.

I am still uncertain about where I stand on many things, as I\'ve always raised more questions than settled on answers. You might find your seeking an answer in life to be this way too. That alright, and that is good.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Dylan Typed This
